title: Marketplace Manager - Lenskart - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Lenskart - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the Lenskart family as a Marketplace Manager in Bengaluru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Lenskart:
Lenskart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart!
